title: RobotPlaceTargetPos Property
description: Sets / gets the target place position for a part.
notes:
The RobotPlaceTargetPos result returns the actual place position of a part.  Normally, RobotPlaceTargetPos is not needed.  The system automatically calculates it during calibration of RobotPlacePos.  RobotPlaceTargetPos can be used to adjust the part place position after calibration, if necessary.

See Also: RobotPlaceTargetPos Property

CalRobotPlacePos Property

Vision Objects: RobotPlaceTargetPos Property
